highlights.title: Prettier is now an enforced gate, not just a config
highlights.summary: npm run verify ends with format:check (after docs:sync, so generated rewrites are covered), and the PR/mainline workflows run it explicitly.

highlights.title: Testing strategy documented
highlights.summary: docs/testing-strategy.md now describes the ordered verify gate, test tiers, oracle ladder, browser/visual/mutation/coverage gates, and what is deliberately out of headless scope (fixes the previously broken CONTRIBUTING.md link).

highlights.title: Scoped publishing and coordinated releases
highlights.summary: Renamed the unpublished package coordinate to @elliotjung/pendulum-lab, added npm/JSR OIDC publication lanes, and made one simulator tag gate the landing evidence sync, smoke/Lighthouse pass, package publication, release assets, and …
